title: Trimble Inc. (TRMB) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: An intrinsic value estimate for Trimble Inc. (TRMB) based on a 10-year discounted cash flow model. Based on sluggish revenue growth and a high cost of equity, Trimble appears significantly overvalued.
methodology: 10-year Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model utilizing current Free Cash Flow ($522.8M), adjusting for expected moderate growth given a mature market, and discounting at a relatively high rate given a beta of 1.57.
